server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_lzw_encode_produces_decodable_gif_stream
def test_lzw_encode_produces_decodable_gif_stream() -> None:
    indices = [0, 0, 1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3, 0, 1, 2, 3] * 4
    compressed = encode_lzw(indices, palette_size=4)
    packed = bytes([2]) + pack_lzw_blocks(compressed)
    assert packed[-1] == 0
    assert len(compressed) > 0

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_decode_gif_solid_color
def test_decode_gif_solid_color() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(20, 14, 180, 40, 90)
    payload = encode_gif(raster, max_colors=8)
    decoded = decode_gif(payload)
    assert decoded.width == 20
    assert decoded.height == 14
    assert decoded.channels == 3
    delta = _mean_channel_delta(decoded.data, raster.data)
    assert delta < 8

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_decode_gif_gradient
def test_decode_gif_gradient() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(32, 24)
    payload = encode_gif(raster, max_colors=64)
    decoded = decode_gif(payload)
    assert decoded.width == raster.width
    assert decoded.height == raster.height
    delta = _mean_channel_delta(decoded.data, raster.data)
    assert delta < 70

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_decode_image_accepts_gif_magic
def test_decode_image_accepts_gif_magic() -> None:
    payload = encode_gif(solid_raster(8, 8, 10, 20, 30))
    raster = decode_image(payload)
    assert raster.width == 8
    assert raster.height == 8

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_gif_roundtrip_png_to_gif_to_jpg_pipeline
def test_gif_roundtrip_png_to_gif_to_jpg_pipeline() -> None:
    from image_tool.formats import OutputFormat
    from image_tool.pipeline import convert_raster, load_raster_from_bytes
    from helpers import png_bytes

    source = png_bytes(gradient_raster(28, 20))
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(source, "input.png")
    gif_bytes = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=2)
    roundtrip = load_raster_from_bytes(gif_bytes, "output.gif")
    assert roundtrip.width == raster.width
    assert roundtrip.height == raster.height

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_decode_gif_rejects_invalid_header
def test_decode_gif_rejects_invalid_header() -> None:
    with pytest.raises(GifDecodeError):
        decode_gif(b"NOTGIF")

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_decode_gif_matches_pillow_for_encoder_output
def test_decode_gif_matches_pillow_for_encoder_output() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(24, 18)
    payload = encode_gif(raster, max_colors=32)
    native = decode_gif(payload)
    pillow = Image.open(BytesIO(payload)).convert("RGB")
    pillow_bytes = pillow.tobytes()
    delta = _mean_channel_delta(native.data, pillow_bytes)
    assert delta < 25

server/tests/test_gif_decode.py :: test_gif_logical_screen_parsed_from_encoded_payload
def test_gif_logical_screen_parsed_from_encoded_payload() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(19, 13, 255, 128, 64)
    payload = encode_gif(raster, max_colors=16)
    width, height = struct.unpack_from("<HH", payload, 6)
    decoded = decode_gif(payload)
    assert width == decoded.width == 19
    assert height == decoded.height == 13
